notes: Malta should give full credit to both Maltese and English because both are official and used fluently in everyday public life, education, and tourism across the islands.

evidence.title: Government of Malta: The Maltese Islands
evidence.note: The Government of Malta says Maltese and English are both official languages.

evidence.title: Visit Malta Incentives: Why Malta?
evidence.note: Official tourism guidance says English is an official language alongside Maltese and that communication is seamless for international visitors.
